'''Gap Nine''' was a backwater [[Swamp/Legends|swamp]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Unidentified Gap Nine species|species]].<ref name="AJ7" />

==History==
{{Quote|Long before the Empire, travelers fell from the sky. They were monsters, beasts and foul vermin. They created temples dedicated to darkness and evil. Other travelers soon followed. They were noble warriors who carried with them swords of burning light. After a terrible battle, the creatures were finally destroyed and purged from this world. The warriors turned their dark temples into storehouses of knowledge and peace.|The [[Seer of the Temple|seer]] of a [[Gap Nine temple]]|<ref name="AJ7" />}}
Around [[1500 BBY]], during the [[New Sith Wars]], the [[New Sith|Sith]]<ref name="TEA" /> settled on the planet where they built [[Sith temple/Legends|temples]] to evil spirits. This group was eventually [[Battle of Gap Nine|defeated]] by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], who transformed the temples into storehouses of knowledge.<ref name="AJ7" />

During the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the Galactic Empire, these temples were robbed for their precious artifacts by the Empire, and an [[Imperial Ore Facility (Gap Nine)|Imperial fuel-ore processing plant]] was built. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ore facility was [[Mission to Gap Nine|sabotaged]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="AJ7" />
